description: Stock and extended tokenized file schemas

stock_basicv35.name: Plus/4 BASIC 3.5 PRG
stock_basicv35.description: Plus/4-compatible linked-line form with load address $1001 and stock 3.5 token bytes. See DESIGN.md §5.

extended_c2p1.name: Compiler 2 optional C2P1 package (not required for stock V2/V3.5)
extended_c2p1.description: Optional package envelope for Compiler 2-only tokens. Stock BASIC V2 uses stock_basicv2; supported BASIC 3.5 uses stock_basicv35. See DESIGN.md §5.

notes.cgs1: CGS1 is reserved for Compressed GeoRAM Stream install sidecars only (docs/GEORAM_LOADER_DESIGN.md).
notes.stock_path: Primary LOAD/SAVE/VERIFY path is stock linked-line for V2 (C64) and stock-compatible 3.5 tokens (Plus/4). C2P1 is only for Compiler 2-only packages.
notes.classification: SAVE format follows tokens outside REM/string: C2-only > Plus/4 3.5 > V2. Prefer stock linked-line validation; optional C2P1 only for Compiler 2-only package features.
